summary: Iteration 10 Testing Complete. All new features verified: (1) Landing page at / with 'Connect. Share. Impact.' hero, phone mockup, Connexion/Inscription buttons, features grid, stats section, (2) Pro subscriptions - 4 plans (Star 2000, Hot 5000, Ultima 15000, VIP 50000 XAF) with wallet deduction, (3) Push notifications - list with read/unread states, mark read, mark all read, admin send/broadcast. Demo user has active Star subscription. 21/23 backend tests passed (2 skipped due to test user creation). All frontend flows working.
critical_code_review_comments: Landing page: Dark blue gradient (#0B0542), 'Connect. Share. Impact.' hero, phone mockup with lifestyle image, Connexion/Inscription buttons, 4 feature cards (Messagerie, Wallet, Marketplace, Crypto), stats section (6000+ users, 2000+ messages/day, 8 cryptos)
Pro page: 4 plan cards with correct prices and features, S'abonner buttons, active subscription shows 'Actif' badge, wallet balance displayed
Notifications page: List with read/unread states (red dot indicator), 'Tout lire' button, notification types (broadcast, push, pro_activated)
Landing page correctly redirects to /feed when user is already logged in
Admin can send notifications to specific users and broadcast to all users
Non-admin users correctly blocked from send/broadcast endpoints (403)
seed_data_creation: None - using existing data. Demo user already has Star subscription active.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 added: (1) Landing page at / - public, dark blue hero with phone mockup, redirects to /feed if logged in, (2) Pro subscriptions - 4 plans deducted from wallet, creates subscription record, updates user is_pro, (3) Push notifications - CRUD + admin send/broadcast (IN-APP ONLY, no FCM/OneSignal). Demo user (demo@japap.com) has Star subscription active until 20/05/2026. All previous features (Feed, Chat, Wallet, Services, Crypto, Groups) unchanged and working.
